description: History capability progression map — Skills, Year 7 to 10.
subject: History

standards.title: Develop historical questions
standards.description: develop historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students develop historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry.

standards.title: Locate primary and secondary sources
standards.description: locate and identify primary and secondary sources to use in historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students locate and identify primary and secondary sources to use in historical inquiry.

standards.title: Identify source origin and purpose
standards.description: identify the origin, content, context and purpose of primary and secondary sources
standards.capability_goal: Students identify the origin, content, context and purpose of primary and secondary sources.

standards.title: Describe source usefulness
standards.description: identify and describe the accuracy and usefulness of primary and secondary sources as evidence
standards.capability_goal: Students identify and describe the accuracy and usefulness of primary and secondary sources as evidence.

standards.title: Describe cause and continuity
standards.description: describe causes and effects, and explain continuities and changes
standards.capability_goal: Students describe causes and effects, and explain continuities and changes.

standards.title: Identify past perspectives
standards.description: identify perspectives, attitudes and values of the past in sources
standards.capability_goal: Students identify perspectives, attitudes and values of the past in sources.

standards.title: Explain historical interpretations
standards.description: explain historical interpretations about significant events, individuals and groups
standards.capability_goal: Students explain historical interpretations about significant events, individuals and groups.

standards.title: Create historical arguments
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments, using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that reference evidence from sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that reference evidence from sources.

standards.title: Refine historical questions
standards.description: develop historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students develop historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry.

standards.title: Locate and identify sources
standards.description: locate and identify primary and secondary sources to use in historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students locate and identify primary and secondary sources to use in historical inquiry.

standards.title: Identify source context and purpose
standards.description: identify the origin, content, context and purpose of primary and secondary sources
standards.capability_goal: Students identify the origin, content, context and purpose of primary and secondary sources.

standards.title: Assess source accuracy and usefulness
standards.description: identify and describe the accuracy and usefulness of primary and secondary sources as evidence
standards.capability_goal: Students identify and describe the accuracy and usefulness of primary and secondary sources as evidence.

standards.title: Explain continuity and change
standards.description: describe causes and effects, and explain continuities and changes
standards.capability_goal: Students describe causes and effects, and explain continuities and changes.

standards.title: Identify values and attitudes in sources
standards.description: identify perspectives, attitudes and values of the past in sources
standards.capability_goal: Students identify perspectives, attitudes and values of the past in sources.

standards.title: Explain interpretations of the past
standards.description: explain historical interpretations about significant events, individuals and groups
standards.capability_goal: Students explain historical interpretations about significant events, individuals and groups.

standards.title: Write sourced historical arguments
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments, using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that reference evidence from sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that reference evidence from sources.

standards.title: Develop and modify inquiry questions
standards.description: develop and modify a range of historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and modify a range of historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry.

standards.title: Compare primary and secondary sources
standards.description: locate, identify and compare primary and secondary sources to use in historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, identify and compare primary and secondary sources to use in historical inquiry.

standards.title: Explain source purpose and context
standards.description: identify the origin and content of sources, and explain the purpose and context of primary and secondary sources
standards.capability_goal: Students identify the origin and content of sources, and explain the purpose and context of primary and secondary sources.

standards.title: Explain reliability and usefulness
standards.description: explain the usefulness of primary and secondary sources, and the reliability of the information as evidence
standards.capability_goal: Students explain the usefulness of primary and secondary sources, and the reliability of the information as evidence.

standards.title: Analyse cause and continuity
standards.description: analyse cause and effect, and evaluate patterns of continuity and change
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse cause and effect, and evaluate patterns of continuity and change.

standards.title: Compare historical perspectives
standards.description: compare perspectives in sources and explain how these are influenced by significant events, ideas, locations, beliefs and values
standards.capability_goal: Students compare perspectives in sources and explain how these are influenced by significant events, ideas, locations, beliefs and values.

standards.title: Analyse contested interpretations
standards.description: analyse different and contested historical interpretations
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse different and contested historical interpretations.

standards.title: Construct evidence-based historical arguments
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments, using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge evidence from sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge evidence from sources.

standards.title: Refine historical inquiry questions
standards.description: develop and modify a range of historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and modify a range of historical questions about the past to inform historical inquiry.

standards.title: Compare sources for inquiry
standards.description: locate, identify and compare primary and secondary sources to use in a historical inquiry
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, identify and compare primary and secondary sources to use in a historical inquiry.

standards.title: Explain source origin and context
standards.description: identify the origin and content of sources, and explain the purpose and context of primary and secondary sources
standards.capability_goal: Students identify the origin and content of sources, and explain the purpose and context of primary and secondary sources.

standards.title: Evaluate evidence reliability
standards.description: explain the usefulness of primary and secondary sources, and the reliability of the information as evidence
standards.capability_goal: Students explain the usefulness of primary and secondary sources, and the reliability of the information as evidence.

standards.title: Evaluate cause and continuity
standards.description: analyse cause and effect, and evaluate patterns of continuity and change
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse cause and effect, and evaluate patterns of continuity and change.

standards.title: Explain perspectives in context
standards.description: compare perspectives in sources and explain how these are influenced by significant events, ideas, locations, beliefs and values
standards.capability_goal: Students compare perspectives in sources and explain how these are influenced by significant events, ideas, locations, beliefs and values.

standards.title: Analyse historical debates
standards.description: analyse different and contested historical interpretations
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse different and contested historical interpretations.

standards.title: Communicate complex historical arguments
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments, using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge evidence from sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and historical arguments using historical knowledge, concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge evidence from sources.

capability_threads.description: Capability maturation sequences for History skills. Sequences show increasing sophistication across Years 7 to 10.
